KMV achieves Pareto-optimal cost-quality trade-off vs MPRW (lower RAM, competitive F1)
KMV CKA similarity to Exact remains high (>0.85) across layers and datasets
MPRW peak materialization RAM exceeds Exact in saturation regime
KMV Dirichlet energy trajectory closely tracks Exact across depths (k=32)
KMV Macro-F1 is flat across sketch budgets k=2..32 on ACM/DBLP; MPRW improves with more budget
GloD and PerD F1 scale linearly with |E*| (high R^2); PerD+ shows poor linear fit (negative R^2)
